overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair navigating a gritty industrial alleyway, engaging in melee combat with enemies, and approaching a parked green sports car. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with industrial hazard-striped walls, overhead pipes, graffiti, and neon-lit vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with overhead pipes and hazard-striped walls

events.description: player character transitions from walking to running as they approach the group ahead

agents.ego_description: player character with green hair and weapon walking steadily through the narrow industrial alley toward enemies ahead

notable_agents.action: enemy character standing in the distance ahead, waiting in the alley

entered.detail: large industrial wall with yellow and black hazard stripes running along the left side
large metal pipes and ductwork running overhead between industrial buildings
tall gray concrete industrial wall with minimal detailing on the right side
stacked cardboard boxes and blue barrels along the left wall
scattered trash bags and debris littering the alley floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial alleyway with yellow-black hazard striped walls on the left and concrete walls on the right. The player character with green hair walks forward beneath overhead pipes, approaching a distant figure. The environment is cluttered with cardboard boxes and trash debris scattered across the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat arena in industrial alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: player character engages in melee combat with the enemy in red armor
player character defeats enemies and continues moving forward through the alley

agents.ego_description: engaging in close-quarters melee combat with enemies, striking the red-armored character with a weapon while maneuvering in the tight alley space

notable_agents.action: enemy in red armor with blue hair engaging in combat with the player character
enemy in yellow and blue outfit standing nearby, observing the combat

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful teal and orange graffiti tags
steam rising from a circular vent in the ground creating atmospheric effect
metal chain link fence running along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The player character enters a combat sequence in the narrow alley, fighting an enemy in red armor while another enemy in yellow and blue watches nearby. The walls feature colorful graffiti and steam rises from a floor vent. Bodies lie on the ground as the player defeats the enemies and continues moving forward past the chain link fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley continuation leading to vehicle parking area under overpass

events.description: alley opens slightly as the camera approaches the parked sports car under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the defeated enemies and continuing down the alley toward a parked green vehicle visible in the distance

entered.detail: futuristic green sports car with glowing neon trim parked under the overpass
elevated highway or monorail structure with yellow underside spanning overhead
large green trash bags piled against the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving past the combat area, the player walks through the alley which opens slightly under an overpass structure. A futuristic green sports car with neon accents is parked ahead. The chain link fence continues along the left while trash bags pile up on the right, and the yellow-striped industrial wall remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking area under industrial overpass

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the green sports car, moving around it to continue down the alley

entered.detail: wall with colorful graffiti tags near the parked vehicle

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the green sports car parked under the overpass, passing by its glowing neon trim. The camera moves past the vehicle, revealing more of the alley continuing ahead with industrial buildings visible in the distance. The chain link fence recedes to the left as the player explores the area around the parked car.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial alleyway that transitions from a tense combat zone into a quiet area featuring a futuristic vehicle. It begins with the green-haired character walking through a narrow corridor of hazard-striped walls and overhead pipes, navigating past scattered cardboard boxes and trash. As the character engages in a melee fight with armored enemies, the scene shifts to a chaotic skirmish amidst colorful graffiti and rising steam before the camera moves past a chain-link fence. The alley then opens slightly under an overpass structure, where the environment clears to reveal a parked green sports car with glowing neon accents. Finally, the camera glides past the vehicle's neon trim, leaving the fence behind to reveal the sprawling industrial buildings that stretch further into the distance.
